embed.title: !raid
embed.description: Alerts for raid bosses at gyms. Track by pokemon name, raid level, or both.

fields.name: By pokemon
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}raid tyranitar`
`{{prefix}}raid tyranitar metagross salamence d:1000` — any of these, within 1km

fields.name: By level
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}raid level:5` — all 5-star raids
`{{prefix}}raid legendary` — alias for level:5
`{{prefix}}raid mega` — level:6
`{{prefix}}raid elite` — elite raids
`{{prefix}}raid shadow` — shadow raids (level:15)
`{{prefix}}raid ultra beast` — level:8
`{{prefix}}raid primal` — level:10

fields.name: Team and gym filters
fields.value:
`team:instinct` / `team:valor` / `team:mystic` / `team:harmony`
`ex` — EX raid eligible gyms only
`gym:gymname` — a specific gym by name

Example: `{{prefix}}raid level:5 team:valor d:1500`

fields.name: Move filter
fields.value: `move:meteor_mash` — only if the boss has this move (use underscores for multi-word move names)

fields.name: RSVP
fields.value:
`rsvp` — include raid RSVP updates in the alert
`rsvp_only` — only send RSVP change updates, not the initial spawn

fields.name: Distance and area
fields.value:
`d:1500` — within 1500m of your location
`area:city_centre` — only in a specific area

fields.name: Message flags
fields.value:
`clean` — auto-delete when the raid ends
`edit` — single message, edited in place as RSVP counts change
`ping` — @-mention you

fields.name: Remove
fields.value:
`{{prefix}}raid remove tyranitar`
`{{prefix}}raid remove level:5`
`{{prefix}}raid remove everything`
`{{prefix}}untrack id:12` — remove by UID from `{{prefix}}tracked`
